en_title: Leon Kennedy's Voice Actor Says Capcom Cut His "Favorite" Line From Resident Evil Requiem
cn_title: 《生化危机：安魂曲》里昂配音演员自曝被卡普空删掉的「最爱」台词
subtitle: 一句蜘蛛双关未进成片
opus_summary: 里昂配音演员Nick Apostolides透露，他曾为《生化危机：安魂曲》录制一句与蜘蛛童谣相关的俏皮话，自称若保留会是最喜欢的台词，但卡普空最终采用了其他版本。

paragraphs.en: Nick Apostolides, best known as the voice behind beloved Resident Evil protagonist Leon S. Kennedy, revealed a hilarious voice line he pitched for RE9 that got cut from final game.
paragraphs.cn: 以为《生化危机》人气主角里昂·S·肯尼迪配音而闻名的Nick Apostolides透露，他为《生化危机9》提议的一句搞笑台词最终被成品删掉。

paragraphs.en: Apostolides’ performance as Leon Kennedy in Resident Evil Requiem saw him lean into the character’s badass, '80s-action-flick persona that first blossomed in RE4 , giving him a slew of lovably corny one-liners that he spouts off throughout the course of the game.
paragraphs.cn: Apostolides在《生化危机：安魂曲》中饰演里昂·肯尼迪时，进一步发挥角色自《生化危机4》开始形成的强悍80年代动作片形象，让他在游戏过程中说出大量俗套却讨喜的俏皮话。

paragraphs.en: One of these quips was suggested by Apostolides’ during Leon’s fight with the Titan Spinner in Raccoon City — but unfortunately, it didn’t end up making the cut. And that’s a real bummer, because it’s priceless.
paragraphs.cn: 其中一句由Apostolides为里昂在浣熊市与Titan Spinner交战时提出，但遗憾的是最终没能保留。这确实令人失望，因为那句话堪称无价。

paragraphs.en: He revealed this information during a podcast episode with fellow voice actors Ben Starr and Alanah Pearce, where he said it would have been his “favorite” line in the game, had it been used in the final product.
paragraphs.cn: 他在与配音演员Ben Starr和Alanah Pearce共同录制的一期播客中透露此事，并表示如果成品采用，那会是他在游戏中「最喜欢」的台词。

paragraphs.en: “When you fight the spider, I wanted to say — and we recorded it — ‘You know, you’ve been a real itsy-bitsy pain in my ass,'” he said, delivering the line in Leon’s gruff, grizzled voice. “It would have been a banger.”
paragraphs.cn: 他用里昂粗粝沧桑的声音说道：「和蜘蛛战斗时，我想说——而且我们也录了——『你知道吗，你这只小蜘蛛可真让我头疼。』那肯定会非常精彩。」

paragraphs.en: Pearce and Starr were in complete agreement, as were commenters across the net, with one writing on X, “This would have been freaking incredible.”
paragraphs.cn: Pearce和Starr完全赞同，网上评论者也是如此。一人在X写道：「这本来会帅爆了。」

paragraphs.en: Instead, it seems Capcom went with a slightly different approach, with Leon saying, “You are a real pest, you know that?” and, “I don’t have time for pest control,” during the battle.
paragraphs.cn: 不过，卡普空似乎选择了略有不同的处理，里昂在战斗中说的是：「你可真是个害虫，知道吗？」以及「我没时间除虫。」

paragraphs.en: With Requiem in the books, fans are now looking forward to the Code Veronica remake , which is slated to release some time in 2027. Until then, there’s Zach Cregger’s film adaptation of the series coming to theaters this October, which has already been met with cautious excitement from longtime fans of the franchise.
paragraphs.cn: 随着《安魂曲》告一段落，粉丝如今期待计划于2027年某时发售的《代号：维罗妮卡》重制版。在此之前，Zach Cregger改编的系列电影将于今年10月上映，已经让系列老粉丝产生谨慎的期待。
